name: K2-AAI-industry-tweaks
title: Krastorio 2 AAI industry integration tweaks
author: Nezgal
description:
Some tweaks for better AAI industry integration with Krastorio 2:
  - Sets AAI industrial furnace as prerequisite and ingredient for K2 advanced furnace
  - Changes technology price for smoother progression of furnaces
  - Reduces AAI industrial furnace module slots to 3 for linear progression
  - Rises some stack sizes to be more consistent
